\# rules for ASRCTF and dIScord:‌‌‌‌‍‍‍‬ #

1\. do not attack any of‌‌‌‌‍﻿‍‍ our infraStructure Or modiFy any flags‌‌‌‌‍﻿﻿‍. immediate disqUalificatioN if your team was found to have **p**urposefu**l**ly don**e** so.

‌‌‌‌‍‬‍‬

2\. BRute fOrce solves on infr**as**tructur**e** is ‌‌‌‌‍‬﻿‍strictly not allowed. all challen**g**es are‌‌‌‌‌﻿‍‌ solvable w**i**thout brute forcing.



3‌‌‌‌‍‌‬‌. respect each other. do not talk down‌‌‌‌‍‍‬‬ on others;‌‌‌‌‍‬‌﻿ remember ‌‌‌‌‍‬‌﻿that we are all here to learn and ‌‌‌‌‌﻿‍﻿ha**ve** **f**un‌‌‌‌‍‌﻿‬.



4\. abso**l**utely ‌‌‌‌‍‌‌﻿no sh**a**rin**g** of‌‌‌‌‍‌‬‍ flag with other teams.



5.‌‌‌‌‍‍‍‬ refrain from dm-ing ‌‌‌‌‍‌﻿‌anyone for help with a ctf problem (without prior consent).‌‌‌‌‍‌‍‍ this‌‌‌‌‍‍‌‬ put the‌‌‌‌‍‬‬‌ pressure to reply on the person. you can ask in the server.

‌‌‌‌‌﻿‌‍

6\. the organizers‌‌‌‌‌﻿‍‬ have the right to disqualify‌‌‌‌‍﻿‬‬ you and your team if you exhibit:

&#x20;   - disruptive behavior.

&#x20;  ‌‌‌‌‍﻿‬‍ -‌‌‌‌‍‬‌‍ any form of‌‌‌‌‍﻿‬‬ disrespect to other participants or organizers.

&#x20;   ‌‌‌‌‍‬‬‍- suspicious behavior,‌‌‌‌‌﻿‬‌ including but not limited‌‌‌‌‍‍‬‬‌‌‌‌‍‬﻿‌ to excessive ai usage.



7‌‌‌‌‍‍‬‌. all flags will be in the form of ‌‌‌‌‌‌‬‬asrctf{flag\_here} unless otherwise stated.



8\. follow discord tos (as you should).



9\. raise a ticket should you have any question. more information will be found at <#1438378965545910303> .
